MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-10-2013 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. MICHAEL NEAL PADWAY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MARK LOBRE APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT NORA WAGNER. REBECCA MENENDEZ APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS CAMERON STACEY AND MEREDITH STACEY VIA COURTCALL. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/14/13 IS CONTINUED TO 5/20/13 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 AFTER PARTIES HAVE MET AND CONFERRED IN THE HALLWAY. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
